item.title: Oh yes, the reason America invades everywhere because we love gay people and women so much
item.description:
Oh yes, the reason America invades everywhere because we love gay people and women so much. This is the most radicalising one sentence I have ever heard when it comes to anti-imperialism



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Look what i foundddd ehehehe
item.description:
Look what i foundddd ehehehe . More info On W4MP. Apply by emailing press@london.mfa.gov.il with a cover letter and CV (I have found Chat GPT to be very good at making relevant cover letters). It would be so bad if a bunch of propalestinian protesters found and shared this so it was super hard for them to find a qualified Canodatw to push thier propaganda. #israel #palestine #leftist #protest



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Oh yes I know, the most politically strategic thing I can do to reduce harm is pledge allegiance to a literal blue fascist two y...
item.description:
Oh yes I know, the most politically strategic thing I can do to reduce harm is pledge allegiance to a literal blue fascist two years before I’m even called to determine whether I should vote for him



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
